name: gsa_calc
description: GSA CALC+ MCP server (1102tools/federal-contracting-mcps). 8 read-only tools over the GSA CALC+ Labor Ceiling Rates API: keyword/exact search, autocomplete, filtered browse, IGCE benchmarking, price reasonableness, vendor rate cards, SIN distribution analysis. No API key required (1,000 requests/hour rate limit).
